platform_stderr_redirect_handle_t(3) Library Functions Manual platform_stderr_redirect_handle_t(3)

NAME

platform_stderr_redirect_handle_t - Handle for temporary stderr redirection.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/platform/system.h>

Data Fields


int original_fd
int devnull_fd

Detailed Description

Handle for temporary stderr redirection.

Opaque handle returned by platform_stderr_redirect_to_null() that can be used to restore stderr to its original destination.

Definition at line 375 of file system.h.

Field Documentation

int platform_stderr_redirect_handle_t::devnull_fd

/dev/null file descriptor (-1 if not opened)

Definition at line 377 of file system.h.

int platform_stderr_redirect_handle_t::original_fd

Original stderr file descriptor (-1 if not redirected)

Definition at line 376 of file system.h.
